name: segmented
description: A single-select segmented control (Ant Design Segmented parity): a recessed track with one raised pill marking the selected option. lievit's toggle-buttons/toggle-group only approximate the look; this is the dedicated primitive, built the CSP-clean native way -- one sr-only radio per option + a visible <label> segment, peer-checked raising the selected segment to the popover surface with a small shadow (shadcn visual language, not Ant's). Single-select by construction (radio group); use toggle-buttons for multi-select. Options arrive as a typed ordered Map (key submitted, value visible). Sizes sm|md|lg; block stretches full width. A11y: <fieldset role=radiogroup> with native radios (platform roving + single-selection). Server-first PARTIAL, zero JS, CSP-clean.
docs: Copies the segmented partial to your JTE root at lievit/segmented.jte, reached as @template.lievit.segmented(name=..., value=..., options=...). Pass an ordered Map of key->label; value selects the active key. size=sm|md|lg, block=true stretches full width. Single-select only (native radio group, arrow-key roving for free); use toggle-buttons for multi-select. The source is yours: edit freely.
